subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1915-07-24 in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: At such time as the darkness of ignorance had enshrouded the horizon of the East, in such an hour did Bahá'u'lláh appear. His light in the East [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: در وقتی که ظلمت نادانی افق شرق را تاریک کرده بود در چنین وقتی حضرت بهاء الله ظاهر شد.  نورش در شرق
subcodes.subjects: @lists; enumerations of Baha'i principles, @universal peace; world unity, @religion as source of love and unity, @Declaration of Baha'u'llah, @unity; oneness of humanity, @harmony of science and religion, @universal language, @equality of men and women, @universal education
